traits.name: Zenith Ray
traits.description: Standing still for 2.5s fires a laser in front of you for %s damage. (10s CD)

traits.name: Incision
traits.description: On ability use, draws a line on the ground. Enemies caught on it take %s damage every 0.5 seconds. Line lasts for 5s. (5s CD)

traits.name: Pack Mentality
traits.description: Gain +%s 𖄕Atk for every ally within an 8 block radius (Max 10 Players).

traits.name: Overkill
traits.description: Abilities have a %s% chance to deal double damage on damage.

traits.name: Cataclysm
traits.description: On ability use, summons a massive orb in the sky that rains mini orbs, striking enemies within 20 blocks 4 times for %s damage per hit. (30s CD)

traits.name: Firebolt
traits.description: On ability use, fires a fireball dealing %s damage on impact. (5s CD)

traits.name: Ragebrew
traits.description: Drinking a flask grants +%s 𖄕Atk for 10 seconds.

traits.name: Fortitude
traits.description: Drinking a flask grants +%s 𖄏Vit and +%s 𖄖Def for 10 seconds.

traits.name: Saturation
traits.description: Flasks heal %s% more 𖄒Health.

traits.name: Fracture
traits.description: Taking damage throws 3 shards outward dealing %s damage. (0.2s CD)

traits.name: Binding
traits.description: Enemies within 6 blocks that attack you are tethered, constantly burning for %s damage/sec while within 8 blocks.

traits.name: Resolve
traits.description: When health drops below 50%, gain a surge of +%s 𖄏Vit.

traits.name: Burning Fang
traits.description: Damage dealt by your pets ignites enemies for %s damage/s for 8s. (5s CD)

traits.name: Rally
traits.description: Gain +%s 𖄐Crit DMG and 𖄖Def while playing with atleast 1 ally within 100 blocks.

traits.name: Forsaken
traits.description: Gain +%s 𖄐Crit DMG and 𖄖Def while playing less than 3 allies within 100 blocks.

traits.name: Composure
traits.description: Avoiding damage for 8s multiplies your weapon by %sx until hit.

traits.name: Spiritual Bond
traits.description: Pets deal %s% more damage or heal for %s% health.

traits.name: Ember Idol
traits.description: Places a Phoenix Totem every 10s. Standing near it for 2.5s explodes for %s AoE damage in a 10 block radius. Totem lasts 5s.

traits.name: Aegis Idol
traits.description: Places a Guardian Totem every 10s. Standing within 7 blocks of it grants +%s 𖄖Def. Totem lasts 8s.

traits.name: Ambush
traits.description: Deal +%s% more damage to enemies above 60% HP.

traits.name: Deathmark
traits.description: Deal +%s% more damage to enemies below 40% HP.

traits.name: Airborne
traits.description: Jumping in dungeons grants a massive +%s 𖄔Spd burst for 4s. (10s CD)

traits.name: Dodgebreaker
traits.description: Evading an attack counters for %s damage to the nearest enemy. (0.2s CD)

traits.name: Burning Spirit
traits.description: A flame trails behind you, dealing %s contact damage and igniting enemies for %s damage/s for 5s. (4s CD on impact, burning doesn't stack)

traits.name: Overdrive
traits.description: Gain +1 𖄔Spd for every second you move, up to Max %s. Lost after stopping for 2s.

traits.name: Discipline
traits.description: Gain +0.5 𖄕Atk every second avoiding damage, up to Max %s. Resets on hit.

traits.name: Feastbound
traits.description: Every hit feeds your soul. After 10 stacks, next hit deals %s bonus damage. (1.2s cooldown per stack)

traits.name: Soul Leach
traits.description: Every weapon hit lifesteals for %s% of the base damage dealt.

traits.name: Deep Cut
traits.description: Hitting enemies causes them to bleed for %s damage/sec for 4s. Refreshes on hit.

traits.name: Infernal Surge
traits.description: On weapon hit, summons a fiery quake forward dealing %s damage up to 9 blocks away. (5s cooldown)

traits.name: Primed
traits.description: Your first hit after not attacking for 6s strikes them a second time, allowing you to deal %sx weapon damage for 1.2s. (Cancels when swapping)

traits.name: Starfall
traits.description: On hit, summons a meteor dealing massive %s AoE damage in a 5 block radius. (20s cooldown)
